title: GMS Week 28 - TRUCE BREAKS, RIVERS RISE
section_path: GMS Week 28 - TRUCE BREAKS, RIVERS RISE
section_path_text: GMS Week 28 - TRUCE BREAKS, RIVERS RISE
summary:
Main
The peace lasted three weeks. After Iranian projectiles struck three tankers in the Strait of Hormuz on July 6 and 7,the United States hit more than 80 targets in one night and roughly 90 the next, from Qeshm Island and the approaches to Bandar Abbas to the Chabahar maritime control tower, and revoked the waiver permitting Iranian oil sales. Iran responded with attacks against U.S.
